system.description:
The psyker reads the Emperor's Tarot for a specific individual to grant insight into future troubles. A specific question must be asked. Takes typically 30 minutes. Psyniscience Test — every 2 DoS reveals more: DoS 0 = greatest opposition ahead; DoS 2 = fears in play (number equal to PR used); DoS 4 = greatest advantage or tool at hand; DoS 6+ = single sentence of advice on the clearest path. Psychic Phenomena rolls provoked by this technique add +10.

Focus Power Test: Psyniscience

Prerequisites: Foreshadow

XP Cost: 200
